Interpretation

Beginner I Ching Interpretation Guide

A useful I Ching interpretation turns the result into better attention, not automatic decisions.

Start with the question

The quality of the question affects the usefulness of the reading. Ask about a real situation, not a demand for certainty.

Read in layers

Look at the primary hexagram, changing lines, and relating hexagram as connected layers. Each layer should refine the same situation.

Keep responsibility

Use the reading as reflection. For legal, medical, financial, safety, or high-stakes issues, use qualified advice and evidence.

Try the tool

Cast a reading and compare the result with this guide.

Open tool

Hexagrams

Browse 64 hexagrams

I Ching Reading Guide

A calm I Ching tool for hexagrams, changing lines, and reflective decisions.
